Amended Notice Of Motion To Vacate Arbitration
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for plaintiff and defendat.
Plaintiff's Motion to Vacate Arbitration is heard this day. After argument of counsel court ordered motion denied. Case remains in Arbitration. Court ordered a new panel of arbitrators to be issued on or after 11/18/2002. Court ordered defendant to prepare proposed order to the court within five days. Proceedings reported by: Eric L. Throne, CSR #7855. (212)
